title: davallia elegans var. bidentata
intro: Davallia elegans var. bidentata, also known as the two-toothed davallia or the two-tooth fern, is a species of fern in the family Davalliaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Davallia elegans var. bidentata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Davallia elegans var. bidentata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and is also used in traditional Asian cooking as a flavoring agent.
